title: Record: Pre-Enrichment + Encoder Recurrence (val_bpb=1.1855)
body:
## Summary
  - **val_bpb: 1.1855** (sliding window eval, stride=64)
  - **Artifact size: 15.75MB** (under 16MB cap)
  - 8xH100, 8004 steps in 600s, 10 layers, 512d

  ## Key Architecture
  1. **GELU Pre-enrichment**: Two linear projections with GELU before transformer blocks
  2. **2x Encoder Recurrence**: Encoder blocks run twice with RMS norm between passes. 15 effective layers from 10
  physical blocks. A/B data shows depth advantage beats 50% more training steps.

  ## Additional Techniques
  Overtone embedding init, decoupled Muon weight decay, batched sliding window eval (stride=64), MATRIX_LR=0.06,
  TIED_EMBED_LR=0.1.

  See [README](records/track_10min_16mb/2026-03-20_PreEnrich_EncoderRecurrence/README.md) for ablations and what didn't
  work.
